description: The ButtonStringAppend component can be used to add a string to the beginning or end of a string whenever an IButton is pressed.

fields.TargetString: The string to which ``AppendString`` will be added.
fields.AppendInFront: Whether or not to add ``AppendString`` to the beginning of the string. (This does not reverse ``AppendString``.)

usage: To function, the component simply needs to be attached to a slot that also has a button component attached to it. From then on, pressing that button will activate the ButtonStringAppend, making it append its ``AppendString`` to its ``TargetString``.
